message:
chore: gitignore proptest regression files

Add **/proptest-regressions/ pattern to .gitignore to prevent
proptest-generated regression seed files from being tracked.
These are machine-generated artifacts that vary per-run and
should not be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,9 @@
 /target
 **/*.rs.bk
 
+# Proptest regression files
+**/proptest-regressions/
+
 # Python virtual environment
 .venv/
 __pycache__/
